title: Avoid Using Invalid "Date" Values
description: Using invalid date values can lead to unexpected behavior in your code. This rule checks for bad values used in conjunction with java.util.Date, java.sql.Date, and java.util.Calendar.
recommendation: Use valid date values within the accepted range for each field.
impact: Can lead to unexpected behavior and potential errors.

checks.message: Use valid date values within the accepted range for each field.
